title: Orifice
content:
To perforate in adumbration,
    as obviator, the sphincter muscle
    of intensity; then paint
    the world in aperture,
    a picture of one's mind.
meaning:
Paul Cameron Brown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Orifice"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
